# Backlog Item

- Backlog Item ID: `FR-005`
- Title: `Modernize layout and technology-forward visual style`
- Requirement: [`FR-005`](../requirements/FR-005.md)
- Persona/Actor: `Prospective small-business client evaluating technical consulting credibility`
- Value statement: `For prospective clients, deliver a modern and technology-forward layout to achieve stronger trust and clearer perception of technical capability.`
- Acceptance criteria (behavior):
  - `Top-level pages apply a cohesive modern visual style with improved hierarchy and spacing.`
  - `Hero and section layouts emphasize technical positioning without reducing content clarity.`
  - `Primary CTA and navigation remain prominent and usable on desktop and mobile.`
  - `Design refresh does not break existing routes, page sections, or content rendering.`
- Dependencies: `FR-001, FR-002, FR-003, FR-004 completed content sections; QR-001 quality checks.`
- Validation approach: `Visual regression spot-check, responsive smoke test, accessibility pass, and full CI checks.`
- Priority score: `84`
- Target window: `Phase 2`
- Links:
  - Requirement: [`requirements/FR-005.md`](../requirements/FR-005.md)
  - ADR: `adr/0001-static-first-baseline.md, adr/0003-extension-through-seams.md`
  - ICR: `n/a`
  - PR/changeset: `n/a`
